name: Charleys "5 Pack" Enchilada Sauce
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces New Mexican Long Red Chili Pods (dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the dried chili pods in a large stockpot and completely cover with water.
2. Bring to a boil and cook until the pods are extremely soft and stems can be removed easily. Remove all stems but leave seeds. Seeds are heat.
3. Once the pods are softened, place them in a food processor or blender and emulsify until seeds are chopped and not visible.
4. While processing, add all remaining ingredients except beer.
5. Once processing is complete, return the emulsified sauce to the stockpot and add beer.
6. Cook-down to the desired consistency.
